query: MATCH (ap:`attack-pattern`)     WHERE ANY(_x_mitre_data_sources IN ap.x_mitre_data_sources WHERE                     toLower(_x_mitre_data_sources) CONTAINS toLower("Network Traffic"))     LIMIT 2000     RETURN DISTINCT ap.mitre_id, ap.name, ap.x_mitre_data_sources, ap.x_mitre_detection     ORDER BY rand()
